decoded.meaning: outer ACL = ACE collection; two inner ACL ACEs (NFSv4-style, ADR-0020): ACE1 {type=ALLOW, flags=INHERIT(0x1), subject='peer-a', access_mask=0x0003 READ|WRITE}; ACE2 {type=ALLOW, flags=0, subject='EVERYONE@', access_mask=0x0001 READ, expires_ns=0x0102030405060708}
decoded.note: core-subset-conformant (ALLOW-only, single INHERIT flag) per docs/reference/05 §0x0A
